name: Autoresearch Task
description: Add integration-level tests for CLI entry points and command handlers that are currently untested. Write tests that invoke the main CLI functions with mock inputs/arguments and verify expected outputs or side effects. Target at least 15 new test cases across 3-5 different command modules.
